title: research_code
text:
source

exp_decay

 exp_decay (x:numpy.ndarray, Amplitude:numpy.float32, tau:numpy.float32,
            x0:numpy.float32)

Single exponentially decaying function.









Type
Details




x
ndarray
Input array that contains the indpendent variable.


Amplitude
float32
Prefactor of the exponential decay.


tau
float32
Decay constant.


x0
float32
Offset for the indpendent variable.


Returns
ndarray
A new float array containing the exponentially decaying function.




source


biexp_decay

 biexp_decay (x:numpy.ndarray, Amplitude1:numpy.float32,
              tau1:numpy.float32, Amplitude2:numpy.float32,
              tau2:numpy.float32, x0:numpy.float32)

Bi-exponentially decaying function.









Type
Details




x
ndarray
Input array that contains the indpendent variable.


Amplitude1
float32
Prefactor of the first exponential decay.


tau1
float32
Decay constant of the first exponential term.


Amplitude2
float32
Prefactor of the second exponential decay.


tau2
float32
Decay constant of the second exponential term.


x0
float32
Offset for the indpendent variable.


Returns
ndarray
A new float array containing the exponentially decaying function.




source


gaussian

 gaussian (x:numpy.ndarray, Amplitude:numpy.float32, sigma:numpy.float32,
           x0:numpy.float32)

Gaussian function.









Type
Details




x
ndarray
Input array that contains the indpendent variable.


Amplitude
float32
Prefactor of the gaussian.


sigma
float32
Standard deviation of the gaussian.


x0
float32
Offset for the indpendent variable.


Returns
ndarray
A new float array containing the gaussian function.

float32

tau
float32

float32

x0
float32
Offset for the indpendent variable.


y0
float32
Offset in y.


Returns
ndarray
A new float array containing the exponentially decaying function.
